input.hiring_signal: Opened 7 Python engineering roles in the last 60 days after a $12M Series A

candidate_output.subject: Request: 15 minutes on your Python hiring
candidate_output.body:
Hi Maya,

You opened 7 Python engineering roles in the last 60 days following your recent Series A. Teams at that stage usually hit a bottleneck in recruiting capacity rather than budget.

We place managed Python and data engineers with fast onboarding while you continue full-time hiring.

Would 15 minutes next week be useful to compare notes?

Best,
Yabi
